videos.title: Testing Bodø: Marcialonga Arctic Ski Race
videos.description:
Testing Bodø is Visit Bodø's new series about the activities and life up in Northern Norway. We are testing everything from local restaurant dishes to climbing in the world's northernmost Via Ferrata and learning about the old trading boats that are stored in Bodø and Salten.  

Learn more about Bodø: 
https://visitbodo.com/en/

ABOUT
Visit Bodø is the official destination company and travel inspiration to Bodø and the Salten region in Northern Norway.

CONNECT
Web: https://www.visitbodo.com

Instagram:   / visitbodo

PLANNING A TRIP  TO NORTHERN NORWAY?
